heading: Employment of individuals with disabilities
label: 15007 Employment of individuals with disabilities
text: As a condition of providing assistance under this subchapter, the Secretary shall require that each recipient of such assistance take affirmative action to employ and advance in employment qualified individuals with disabilities on the same terms and conditions required with respect to the employment of such individuals under the provisions of title V of the Rehabilitation Act of 1973 ( et seq.) and the Americans with Disabilities Act of 1990 ( et seq.), that govern employment.29 U.S.C. 79142 U.S.C. 12101
notes: References in TextThe Rehabilitation Act of 1973, referred to in text, is , , . Title V of the Act is classified generally to subchapter V (§ 790 et seq.) of chapter 16 of Title 29, Labor. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub.
